title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period, which typically occurs in November. To begin the enrollment process, log into the employee benefits portal using your company credentials. You will find detailed information about the available health and dental plans, including coverage options and costs. If you are a new employee, you must complete your enrollment within 30 days of your start date. After selecting your desired plans, ensure you submit your choices before the enrollment deadline. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR benefits team at hrbenefits@company.com or call extension 1234. Remember, changes to your enrollment can only be made during the open enrollment period or if you experience a qualifying life event, such as marriage or the birth of a child.
